issues.title: Enemy deals 22 damage (88% of 25 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: During enemy turn (seq 208), the player took 22 damage, which is 88.0% of their 25 HP at the time. Floor 3, encounter 2, turn 3.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider capping single-turn enemy damage or adding damage reduction mechanics

issues.suggestedFix: Consider capping single-turn enemy damage or adding damage reduction mechanics

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3 by knowledge_golem (boss)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against knowledge_golem (boss). Accuracy was 80.0% with 15 cards played over 5 turns. Damage dealt: 52, damage taken: 96.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce early boss/enemy difficulty or provide more healing opportunities before floor 3 boss

issues.title: HP decreases 5 consecutive encounters (81 -> 0)
issues.description: Player HP decreased across 5 consecutive encounters from 81 to 0 with no recovery. Encounters: F2E1, F2E2, F3E0, F3E1, F3E2. HP progression: [81, 63, 61, 47, 0]. This attrition pattern leads to inevitable death.
issues.suggestedFix: Add between-encounter healing, campfire rests, or HP potions

issues.title: F2E2 takes 18 turns (prev floor avg: 2.7, 6.8x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 against stone_sentinel (mini_boss) took 18 turns to resolve, which is 6.8x the average of 2.7 turns from floor 1. This represents a significant difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floor 1 and floor 2; reduce stone_sentinel HP or damage
